title: Correct Localnet verification coverage for every governed script and manifest binding
description: Correct Localnet verification coverage for every governed script and manifest binding
no_spec_change_rationale: This correction strengthens repository verification configuration without changing Localnet plugin runtime behavior or its canonical contract.
acceptance_criteria: The verification lane runs bash syntax checking independently for the command
and test scripts; structural TOML validation binds the localnet command and post-work-start hook to their exact files; native tests and strict SpecSync 100% coverage pass
